3.anchor: We ought always to give thanks to God for you, brothers,
3.note: Or brothers and sisters. In New Testament usage, depending on the context, the plural Greek word

1.anchor: the word of the Lord may speed ahead and be honored,

12.anchor: Now such persons we command and encourage in the Lord Jesus Christ to do their work quietly and to earn their own living.
12.note: Greek to eat their own bread

1.anchor: being gathered together to him, we ask you, brothers,

13.note: Some manuscripts chose you from the beginning
